content_body:
Blue Ridge, Georgia, is a breathtaking destination nestled in the North Georgia Mountains, offering a variety of luxury cabin rentals that cater to all types of travelers. Whether you're seeking adventure, relaxation, or a mix of both, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has the perfect place for you.

Choose from riverfront luxury cabins or stunning mountain-view retreats for your girls getaway trip, guys' fishing trip, romantic getaway, family reunion, couples retreat, or even a solo trip.

Depending on the purpose of your Blue Ridge Mountain getaway, here are the best places to stay in Blue Ridge, GA.

Riverfront Cabin Rentals

If you love the soothing sounds of flowing water and enjoy water activities, our riverfront cabins along the Toccoa River are perfect for you. These luxury 5-bedroom cabins offer direct river access, making them ideal for trout fishing, tubing, and kayaking.

For the fishermen in your group, enjoy the benefits of the historic Cherokee Indian Fish Trap. For tubing and kayaking, enjoy putting in right at the cabin and you will float northwards into McCaysville, GA at the border of GA, TN, and NC.

Enjoy a community area that features 650 feet of Toccoa River frontage with picnic tables and fire pits for your enjoyment. Whether you're an adventure seeker or just looking to unwind by the water, these riverfront cabins provide the perfect escape.

Mountain View Cabins

Located along Aska Road or near the Cohutta Wilderness, our mountain view cabins boast some of the most spectacular panoramas in Blue Ridge. These mountain lodges are perfect for hikers, geocachers, and those who enjoy relaxing on the porch while soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas. If you’re looking for a mix of adventure and tranquility, a mountain-view cabin is your best bet.


High Hopes

Lake Blue Ridge Cabins

For those who prefer lake life, our cabins near Lake Blue Ridge provide easy access to a boat launch, making it simple to go boating, tubing, or kayaking.

Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary offers stunning lake views and spacious furnished porches with an outdoor fireplace ideal for lake viewing. Bring your tubes and kayaks and take advantage of the public boat ramp just ¼ mile from the cabin.

Peaceful mornings on the porch with lake views, rest and relaxation, and 5 minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge make Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary one of our most popular cabin rentals.

Best Cabin for Seclusion and R&R


Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

For ultimate privacy and relaxation, Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek is a hidden gem. Situated on 30 acres with half a mile of creek frontage, this retreat offers a large pond for fishing, rolling hills, and a screened-in porch overlooking a serene landscape. A beautiful flagstone patio with a fire pit makes for unforgettable evenings under the stars. If you need to disconnect from the world and recharge, this is the perfect retreat.


Cohutta Sunset

For stunning mountain views, a higher elevated cabin, outdoor fireplace and hot tub, and luxe interiors Cohutta Sunset is another popular cabin rental for seclusion and rest and relaxation. Offering every amenity you crave in a luxury cabin rental, you will experience the serenity you crave away from your hectic routine.

Best Cabins for Romantic Getaway

Creekside Green - For couples looking for a romantic retreat, Creekside Green is an intimate 2-bedroom cabin located right on Fightingtown Creek. Featuring a cozy fire pit at the water’s edge and a spacious yard, it’s the perfect place to enjoy peaceful moments together. Sit by the pond, relax by the fire, and savor the tranquility of the creekside setting.

Aska Escape Lodge - this aptly named luxury cabin rental is popular for romantic getaways. Tucked away in the woods close to Downtown Blue Ridge, this romantic cabin rental offers the intimacy and serenity you are looking for. A cozy cabin with an outdoor fireplace, intimate hot tub, and luxe furnishings, you will discover the ideal romantic escape.

Guys' Trip or a Girls' Getaway in Blue Ridge

Cabin Rentals of Georgia has hosted many guys' trips, especially fishing trips, in our luxury cabin rentals along the Toccoa River and the famed Noontootla Creek. Enjoy easy river access in these areas that are private.

Girl Getaway Trips are very popular at Cabin Rentals of Georgia. We offer luxuriously outfitted interiors that soothe, pamper, and inspire. Within 15-20 minutes to Downtown Blue Ridge for shopping, dining, antiquing, wineries, or whatever your heart desires, all of our rental cabins are in prime locations.

Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is a popular luxury 5 bedroom/5.5 bath lodge with an outdoor treehouse featuring an outdoor fireplace, sunken hot tub, plentiful conversational seating, and gorgeous mountain views.


Fallen Timber Lodge is another popular luxury 5 bedroom/5.5 bath lodge situated within steps to the Toccoa River and offering luxe interiors, outdoor conversational seating with fire tables, and beautiful views of the big waters of the Toccoa River.

Our luxurious rentals along the river provide the perfect cabin getaway that allow guest privacy, spaciousness, fire pits, outdoor fireplaces, and views.

Relaxation & Views

No matter which cabin you choose, all of our luxury rentals offer stunning views, top-notch amenities, and the perfect setting for making lasting memories.

Whether you're planning a guys’ fishing trip, a girls’ getaway, solo travel, or a planning a large group event, our luxury cabin rentals in Blue Ridge, GA offer an unforgettable experience. Book your perfect stay in Blue Ridge with Cabin Rentals of Georgia and experience one of the best places to stay in the North GA Mountains. Call us today! (706) 432-2140
title: Best Places to Stay in Blue Ridge, GA
